visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Two hosts, a male with brown hair wearing a white long-sleeved shirt and blue denim overalls, and a female with long dark hair wearing a white sweatshirt with a large red flower logo, sit behind a white table in a bright indoor studio. They are smiling and vigorously shaking hands while looking at the camera. The background features a warm floor lamp, a white cabinet with books and a basket, and some pink cherry blossom decorations. (2) A graphic transition occurs, showing a still photo framed in a blue border with cat and cloud icons. The photo depicts a large group of young people posing on a beach with the sea in the background. Large text overlays appear on the graphic. (3) The camera cuts back to the hosts at the table. They use active hand gestures, pointing and waving, while maintaining high-energy facial expressions. Text bubbles and variety-style captions pop up around them. (4) Another graphic transition shows a still photo of a student group in a classroom setting, framed with a grid pattern. The hosts continue to narrate over these transitions, alternating between on-camera segments and full-screen graphic displays of various student service teams. (5) In the final segment, the hosts are back on camera. The male host gestures broadly with his arms, showing off his clothing. They both smile and clap towards the end, maintaining a friendly and enthusiastic posture until the video concludes.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 恭喜恭喜. [Subtitle]: 承讓承讓. (2) [Subtitle]: 沒事啦. [Subtitle]: 好里家的理事長還得是你啊. (3) [Subtitle]: 那是當然的啊. [Subtitle]: 感謝感謝. (4) [Logo]: 好里家. [Slogan]: 嘎哥連任好里家第二屆理事長. (5) [Slogan]: 入選名單好里家第6屆大專福利社. (6) [Subtitle]: 第一間入選的是中國醫藥大學風浪藥學服務社. (7) [Variety]: 淨灘. [Variety]: 育樂營. [Variety]: 健檢. (8) [Subtitle]: 第二間入選的是臺北醫學大學山地社會醫療服務團. (9) [Slogan]: 南投仁愛鄉的部落服務. (10) [Subtitle]: 第三間恭喜高雄師範大學宏遠社會服務社. (11) [Slogan]: 里港玉田小學. (12) [Subtitle]: 第四屆入選的是國立高雄師範大學數學教育推廣隊. (13) [Variety]: 把數學變有趣. (14) [Subtitle]: 第五間恭喜台灣大學慈幼山友團. (15) [Subtitle]: 最後一間我們恭喜國立台灣藝術大學國際紅豆社. (16) [Slogan]: 5萬元的獎助學金. [Slogan]: 30件的hahababy聯名團服. (17) [Logo]: hahababy.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main hosts; approximately 20 distinct individuals appearing in various group photos used as visual evidence.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Male host in a white shirt and blue denim overalls with brown hair; Female host in a white sweatshirt with a large red poppy flower logo and hair clips.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright studio with a white table, a floor lamp, a mantel-like shelf with plants, and pink floral decorations. Injected still photos show a beach with a breakwater and a classroom with a whiteboard.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Fast-paced, high-arousal male and female dialogue begins immediately. Voices are sharp and energetic with clear articulation. A bouncy, high-tempo synthesizer BGM plays underneath. A cartoonish sliding 'whoosh' SFX triggers at the first second. (2) A sharp 'ding' SFX sounds at 0:18 as a transition occurs. The music shifts slightly in volume but remains consistent in tempo. (3) Throughout the middle section, recurring 'pop' and 'bubble' SFX punctuate the speech whenever keywords are mentioned or text appears. (4) At 1:00, a high-pitched 'impact' SFX triggers. The vocal pitch of the male speaker rises during specific group announcements. (5) Toward the end, at 1:40, the music swells slightly. Frequent 'whoosh' sounds mark the rapid cuts between hosts and graphics. The final seconds feature a rhythmic clapping sound and a light stinger effect as the audio fades.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Introduction -> Announcement of Award Winners -> Prize Description -> Conclusion
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To announce the six student service organizations selected for the 6th 'Holi-jia' grant program, highlighting their volunteer work and the rewards they will receive.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The hosts are wearing clothing from the brand 'hahababy', their logo is frequently displayed, and the brand is explicitly mentioned as a prize provider.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy variety show editing style to maintain engagement during an informational announcement. The audio-visual synchronization of sound effects and text pop-ups is highly dense.
